name: velura
description: Velura Fashion Shop monorepo: customer web, admin web, Node.js API and Supabase database

scripts.build: npm run build:user && npm run build:admin
scripts.test:api: node --test tests/api/account-service.test.js tests/api/account-router.test.js tests/api/product-service.test.js tests/api/product-router.test.js tests/api/order-service.test.js tests/api/order-router.test.js tests/api/review-service.test.js tests/api/return-service.test.js tests/api/pricing-service.test.js tests/api/security.test.js tests/api/frontend-auth-security.test.js tests/api/dashboard.test.js tests/api/chatbot-recovery.test.js tests/api/chatbot-service.test.js tests/api/recommendation-service.test.js tests/api/quiz.test.js
